title: phasellus lathyroides
intro: Phasellus lathyroides, also known as Wild Parsnip, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Phasellus lathyroides include its diuretic and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its high levels of vitamin C and its ability to reduce inflammation, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Phasellus lathyroides are typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
